channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Rate setters face ‘double danger’ from Iran war and tariffs, Fed official warns
item.description: <![CDATA[Rate setters face ‘double danger’ from Iran war and tariffs, Fed official warns]]>

item.title: Live Nation stock falls as jury finds ticketing giant acted as an illegal monopoly. Here’s what happens next.
item.description: <![CDATA[Live Nation stock falls as jury finds ticketing giant acted as an illegal monopoly. Here’s what happens next.]]>

item.title: Trump threatens to fire Jay Powell and refuses to halt criminal probe
item.description: <![CDATA[Trump threatens to fire Jay Powell and refuses to halt criminal probe]]>

item.title: Goldman president warns private credit funds are not marketed properly
item.description: <![CDATA[Goldman president warns private credit funds are not marketed properly]]>

item.title: US crude exports hit record as Iran war disrupts Middle East supplies
item.description: <![CDATA[US crude exports hit record as Iran war disrupts Middle East supplies]]>
